double_click_interval.description: The maximum time delay between two click events to be registered as a single double-click operation.

click_mode.description: Toggle between single-click (True) and double-click (False) activation for files and folder items.

dwell_click.description: Software-level trigger that generates a click event automatically when the pointer remains stationary for a defined duration.

night_light_state.description: State of the KWin blue-light filter shader.

cvd_correction_state.description: Activation state for the KWin Color Vision Deficiency (CVD) compensation shader.

cvd_correction_type.description: Integer index for the specific CVD shader algorithm used by the correction plugin.

animation_scale.description: Global multiplier for all UI transition timings. 0 eliminates all motion; 1 is the standard system timing.

system_sounds.description: Global toggle for the oxygen-sound-theme event notifications and workspace audio feedback.

focus_stealing.description: The level of restriction applied to new window processes attempting to take active window focus. 0 is none, 4 is maximum.

sticky_keys.description: Modifier key persistence logic. When true, modifier keys (Shift, Ctrl, Alt) remain active after press until a non-modifier key is pressed.

slow_keys_delay.description: The duration a key must be held before the system registers a character input event.
